entry.title: IDC 89303321DEM000061 (P00060) awarded to IDAHO ENVIRONMENTAL COALITION LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure: Refer to Section H contract clause, H.51 TASK ORDERING PROCEDURE

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: MASTER IDIQ AND PIID 89243222FEMTO03 THIS MODIFICATION REDUCES THE WORK SCOPE OF TASK ORDER 3 FOR THE DESIGN AND INSTALLATION OF SECONDARY ROOF OVER THE EXISTING ROOF OF CPP-603 AND UPDATES J-12, TASK ORDER TRACKING MATRIX.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.
